We congratulate our students and wish them continued success.

Our New Media Department students Birkan Eken, Gülce Beyter, İrem Şen and Koray Altınay won third place in the Digital Broadcasting – Podcast category of the TRT Future Communicators Competition with their podcast series “The Story of Photography”.

Under pandemic conditions, our student İrem Şen attended the ceremony held at TRT Ayazağa studios on behalf of the group and received the award.

Our students talked about Marlon Brando and the Oscar protest in the first episode of the 3-part podcast series titled “The Story of Photography”, and Princess Diana in the second episode. In the last episode, “A Success Story: Sondan Durukanoğlu Feyiz”, they hosted our Rector and talked about his success story from the Black Sea to Kansas.

You can listen to the series via this link:
